title: Relief- Early Years Educator Malay Language (ACEY/ EY2) [Yew Tee]
description:
1- 3 months' Temporary Contract (Renewable)


Job description

Responsibilities

  • Implement developmentally appropriate teaching, learning and caregiving activities aligned with centre’s policies and framework
  • Plan and deliver school curriculum for using age-appropriate teaching aids to foster holistic learning and development
  • Engage the children meaningfully through effective communication and nurture them with love and affection
  • Document children’s progress and address the children's educational and developmental needs
  • Complete the progress report and developmental portfolio for each child every semester
  • Build and maintain positive relationship with children and their parent

Requirements

  • Must have EY2 Certification from ECDA
  • Must have WSQ Advanced Certificate in Early Years (ACEY)
  • Possess a positive working attitude and have the drive to nurture early learners
  • Possess good communication skills
  • Staying in West / NW / North of Singapore

Location

  • Blk 612 Choa Chu Kang Street 62

Working Hours:

  • Rotating Shifts
  • 5-day work week
  • Monday to Friday – 8 to 8.5hrs exclude 1 hour lunch break
  • Centre operates from 7am to 7pm (Monday to Friday)

postedCompany.description:
MERCU Learning Point commenced its operations as a single tuition centre on 16 April 1999 and braced through the challenges to cater to the ever-changing needs and demand shifts in the education industry.

MERCU has now expanded to 15 centres – a network of Early Childhood, Student Care Centres and Kindergarten Care Centres. Kidz Meadow, the Early Childhood branch of MERCU, has 5 childcare centres and 1 kindergarten. Kidz Meadow is also one of the appointed Partner Operators (POP) by Early Childhood Development Agency (ECDA) and have also been awarded the SPARK Certification from ECDA. This signifies our long term commitment towards providing quality programmes for our children and supporting our Educarers with continuous professional training and development.


MERCU has also established itself as one of the leading partners for Student Care services at 6 primary schools. MERCU offers Kindergarten Care Centres at 2 primary schools, providing services beyond children’s MOE Kindergarten hours. Together, these centres provide quality education to more than 2,000 children from 2-month old infants to 12-year old students. MERCU’s educarers are highly qualified and undergo professional training to better nurture early learners.
postedCompany.name: KIDZ MEADOW CHILDCARE & DEVELOPMENT CENTRE LIMITED
